label_i18n.fr: Facteur de risque de mise en œuvre

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate flow rate from a single sprinkler head.
description.long: Calculate flow rate from a single sprinkler head.

short_i18n.en: Calculate flow rate from a single sprinkler head.
short_i18n.tr: Tek bir sprinkler başlığından akacak su debisini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Durchflussrate eines einzelnen Sprinklerkopfes.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le débit d'une seule tête d'arroseur.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el caudal de un solo aspersor.
short_i18n.ar: احسب معدل التدفق من رأس رشاش واحد.
